title: inference.put_custom

task_type.description: The type of the inference task that the model will perform.

custom_inference_id.description: The unique identifier of the inference endpoint.

chunking_settings.description:
The chunking configuration object.
Applies only to the `sparse_embedding` or `text_embedding` task types.
Not applicable to the `rerank` or `completion` task types.

service.description: The type of service supported for the specified task type. In this case, `custom`.

service_settings.description:
Settings used to install the inference model.
These settings are specific to the `custom` service.

task_settings.description:
Settings to configure the inference task.
These settings are specific to the task type you specified.
